front.title: Documenting and Managing DNSSEC Algorithm Lifecycles

abstract.t: Cryptographic algorithms go through multiple phases during their lifetime: experimental, adopted, generally available, in mainstream use, phasing out, deprecated, and obsoleted. This document defines phases for algorithm deployment lifecycles within DNSSEC, and criteria that the IETF and/or other Standards Development Organizations are encouraged to use when moving an algorithm from one phase to the next.
